name: Ossobucco
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge veal shanks in flour and sauté in a mixture of butter and olive oil in a large, heavy frying pan until browned.
2. Season with salt and pepper and transfer to a three-quart casserole.
3. Use pan drippings and frying pan to sauté onion, carrots, celery, and garlic for about six minutes or until softened but not browned.
4. Add white wine and boil until it almost evaporates.
5. Add stock and simmer for five minutes.
6. Season with salt and pepper and pour mixture evenly over meat in casserole.
7. Add bay leaves, one at each side of the casserole.
8. Cover and bake on middle rack of oven pre-heated to 300°F for 1 ½ hours.
9. Five minutes before end of baking time, add Gremolata topping.
Gremolata Topping
Combine in a cup three tablespoons chopped fresh parsley, one tablespoon grated lemon rind, one tablespoon grated orange rind, and one teaspoon chopped garlic.
